days.title: Iconic Gardens and Marina Bay
days.weather: Partly cloudy, 31°C (88°F), 80% chance of afternoon thunderstorm.
activities: Visit Gardens by the Bay and Cloud Forest
Walk across Marina Bay Sands SkyPark Observation Deck
Watch Spectra Light and Water Show at Marina Bay
days.budgetNote: Attraction tickets approx. SGD 53. Transport via MRT ~SGD 2.

days.title: Cultural Heritage in Chinatown
days.weather: Hot and humid, 32°C (90°F), scattered showers expected.
activities: Explore Buddha Tooth Relic Temple and Museum
Browse shops and street food at Pagoda Street
days.budgetNote: Temple entry free. Food budget approx. SGD 25. Total attraction costs minimal.

days.title: Nature and Shopping at Jewel Changi
activities: Visit HSBC Rain Vortex at Jewel Changi Airport
Enjoy dining options within Jewel complex
days.budgetNote: Rain Vortex viewing is free. Canopy Park ticket approx. SGD 27. Dining budget approx. SGD 40.

days.title: Northern Frontier and Local Life
days.weather: Tropical rain likely, 29°C (84°F), 90% chance of precipitation.
activities: Visit Woodlands Checkpoint area for local vibes
Dine at local hawker centers near Woodlands
days.budgetNote: War Memorial entry free. Transport via bus/train ~SGD 3. Food budget approx. SGD 15.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Lightweight long-sleeve shirt for air-conditioned malls/temples

categories.name: Accessories & Gear
items: Compact umbrella or lightweight rain poncho

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Some SGD cash for hawker centers and small vendors
